items.name: machine-genome
items.description: Machine Genome is an open identity and provenance protocol for models, agents, harnesses, datasets, and the artifacts that connect them.

items.name: open-dictate
items.description: Local-first Traditional Chinese dictation for macOS

items.name: murmur
items.description: Private, on-device voice dictation for macOS

items.name: protestchat
items.description: Encrypted messaging with no internet, no cell tower, and no server. Phones relay for each other over Bluetooth mesh, so it keeps working during shutdowns and inside cellular jammers.

items.name: midscroll
items.description: FOSS Middle Mouse Scroll replacement for Linux

items.name: stem-illustration-skill
items.description: 面向 STEM（科学、技术、工程、数学）领域的 AI 图像生成 Skill。  生成科研示意图、教学插图、技术架构图等概念性图像，覆盖生物医学、化学、物理、工程、数学 6 大学科。  功能特性 24 个场景模板：信号通路、实验流程、细胞结构、概念信息图、学术海报、机制图、质粒图、机器学习架构等 6 大学科适配：生命科学/医学/化学/物理/工程/数学 4 种风格变体：academic / textbook / infographic / 3d-render

items.name: agfx
items.description: Small RHI for indie game development

items.name: oil-visual
items.description: A manga-ink illustration style for clear visual explanations with Codex

items.name: macOSAppstoreDecrypter
items.description: Source code for an online decrypted app on App Store, require M1 macOS running on 11.2.3 or lower

items.name: table-of-content-component
items.description: A dependency-free vertical table of content Web Component

items.name: block-parser
items.description: A lightweight blockchain block parser written in modern C++ that reads raw block files, extracts header information, verifies hashes, decodes transactions and provides a simple command-line interface for blockchain research.

items.name: btc-node-tools
items.description: Lightweight command-line utilities for inspecting Bitcoin blockchain data, decoding block headers, validating hashes and analyzing peer-to-peer network information for educational and research purposes.

items.name: nativ
items.description: Local AI, native to your Mac. Chat, serve, monitor, and connect MLX models from one macOS app.

items.name: simple-wallet-cli
items.description: A minimal command-line cryptocurrency wallet simulator demonstrating wallet generation, balance tracking, transaction history and address validation for educational blockchain development.

items.name: p2p-messenger
items.description: Experimental peer-to-peer messaging application demonstrating decentralized communication, encrypted message exchange and lightweight node discovery using the Go programming language.

items.name: Kairos
items.description: [ACM CCS 2026] Kairos: Efficient High-Threshold Asynchronous Distributed Key Generation from Lightweight Cryptography

items.name: sha256-bench
items.description: A lightweight benchmarking utility for comparing SHA-256 hashing performance across different file sizes and memory buffers. Includes timing reports, checksum validation and command-line options for educational use.

items.name: crypto-playground
items.description: Educational Python implementations of classic cryptographic algorithms including SHA-256 hashing, Caesar cipher, XOR encryption, Base58 encoding, Merkle tree construction and key generation examples for learning purposes.

items.name: discordzapret
items.description: Новая версия с поддержкой работы Discord в текущих условиях. Быстрее, стабильнее, надежнее.

items.description: Новая версия с поддержкой работы Discord в текущих условиях. Быстрее, стабильнее, надежнее.

items.name: League-of-Legends-Menu
items.description: This League of Legends cheat, developed in C++, offers a range of features to enhance your gameplay experience. From optimizing champion movement and attacks with Orbwalker to increasing awareness with Zoomhack, Lasthit, and Harass functionalities, this cheat provides a virtual assistant for your in-game character.

items.description: Новая версия с поддержкой работы Discord в текущих условиях. Быстрее, стабильнее, надежнее.

items.name: MaxwellEquations
items.description: End-to-end formally verified solvers for the Maxwell and perfectly hyperbolic Maxwell equations in 1D, 2D, and 3D.

items.name: Danielreedyel
items.description: Open source developer focused on cryptography, distributed systems, Bitcoin research and secure peer-to-peer software.
